title: Arm AGI CPU explained..
summary: Arm announced its first AGI CPU optimized for agentic use cases, entering the competitive custom CPU market where hyperscalers increasingly design specialized processors for their data centers. The move highlights growing semiconductor demand, capital intensity, and supply chain coordination with TSMC.
